parameters: 一括セルフスイッチ操作

...Hmm, the rocks are still in the way... But I can see light leaking from deep
inside there... Maybe we can get out somewhere from beyond that...?

It's about time for dinner, isn't it...? Elly might have come again, so let's head
back to the collapsed area...
一括セルフスイッチ操作

...Ahh, I'm s-so tired... Let's call it a day for today... Elly will probably bring
me some food, so I should head back........
一括セルフスイッチ操作

...Hah, haa...! D-damn...! Th-this bastard...! If I can just break through here...!
Move...! Shatter...!

It looks like there's still a path further in... Maybe we can get back to the
original place from there...?
Oh, it's about time Elly might be coming back. Let's go check out the collapsed area.
